task: Advanced high-economic-value task: perform an auditable CVaR-constrained supplier allocation audit using only the embedded packet. Construct a reproducible workbook or script (supplier_cvar_audit.xlsx) and a concise expert memo for signoff (sourcing_decision.md). Include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity analyses (including the 5% sensitivity rule described below), and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, impute missing values, or make outside assumptions. Follow the named classification thresholds exactly. Remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. Flag needs_expert_review if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift. Document every assumption; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
